journal_entry.description: Short-term loan advanced to business partner
journal_entry.rationale: Target advances a $2,000,000 short-term loan (1-year term) to a business partner. The loan principal is recorded as a financial asset (Loans Receivable — Short-term) and cash decreases. Interest will be recognized as revenue monthly when earned, not at the time of loan disbursement. This entry records only the principal transfer.

output_debit_classifier.reason: Loan principal advanced: asset (Loans Receivable) increases, asset (Cash) decreases. Interest revenue will be recognized monthly as earned per accrual accounting, not at disbursement.

output_credit_classifier.reason: Loan principal advanced: asset (Loans Receivable) increases, asset (Cash) decreases. Interest revenue will be recognized monthly as earned per accrual accounting, not at disbursement.
